creator: kevin@ns1.stcp.net
text:
Under SPECIAL FEATURES heading:

     To make up for this, the FreeBSD version of ypserv handles the
     master.passwd.byname and master.basswd.byuid maps in a special way.  When

s/master.basswd.byuid/master.passwd.byuid 

Nothing too important, since the user isnt't the one it. :P

Fix: 

fix fix fix
How-To-Repeat: 
man ypserv
